data.name: auto
data.description: EU GPT auto router. Selects the best available model based on reasoning needs, retrieval needs, speed, input complexity, context length, cost, and backend availability.

data.name: gpt-oss-120b
data.description: Strong general reasoning open-weight model hosted on European infrastructure.

data.name: qwen3-235b-a22b-instruct-2507
data.description: Large-context Qwen model with 235B parameters and 22B active parameters. Competitive with frontier proprietary models.

data.name: llama-3.3-70b-instruct
data.description: Meta Llama 3.3 70B instruction model. Approaches Llama 3.1 405B quality at 70B cost.

data.name: llama-3.1-nemotron-70b-instruct
data.description: NVIDIA Nemotron 70B instruction model, RLHF-tuned for instruction following on top of Llama 3.1.

data.name: llama-3-70b-instruct
data.description: Earlier Llama 3 70B instruction model with shorter context. Use Llama 3.3 unless this exact lineage is needed.

data.name: mixtral-8x7b-instruct-v0.1
data.description: Mixture-of-experts instruction model with 47B total parameters and 13B active parameters. Balanced cost and quality.
